title: gossypium barbadense var. maritimum
intro: Gossypium barbadense var. maritimum, also known as the sea cotton or maritime cotton, is a subspecies of the cotton plant, native to the coastal regions of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gossypium barbadense var. maritimum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gossypium barbadense var. maritimum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's fiber to create a topical poultice or salve.
